title: Mondoro Heat Wave
lead: Mondoro is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.60. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Mondoro has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), reaching 11.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 28%, while the wind speed is approximately 13.5 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating minimal cooling relief.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
